data.title: Equitable Inks Reinsurance Deal With RGA And Plans To Boost Stake In AllianceBernstein: Details
data.description: RGA enters a $32 billion reinsurance agreement with Equitable Holdings. The deal will generate significant returns for RGA, with expected growth in adjusted operating income, and further enhances RGA's strategic partnership in product development and distribution.

data.title: Zelensky Says Ukraine Won't Trade Minerals For Debt, Seeks 'Win-Win' Deal With US
data.description: Ukraine and US negotiate rare earth mineral deal, Zelensky wants security guarantees and a mutually beneficial agreement.Ukraine-US rare earth mineral deal in negotiation, Zelensky seeks security guarantees and mutually beneficial terms.

data.title: Top 3 Tech Stocks That May Crash In Q1
Microsoft Pulls Plug On AI Data Center Leases, Says Analyst: Oversupply Situation Likely
data.description: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) has reportedly begun to cancel leases for a significant portion of its AI data center capacity in the United States, as per a recent report by TD Cowen.

data.title: The Rise of Passive Investing: How Crypto is Evolving for Retail Investors
data.description: Crypto indexes are poised to become a preferred investment vehicle for long-term, diversified exposure to the crypto market. Here's why.
